findings.description: The directory structure diagram (code-block:: bash) showing the expected project layout after deletion is omitted. It includes specific paths such as `ui_plugins/bin/ui_build.bat`, `ui_plugins/bin/ui_build.sh`, and named node_modules packages (jquery, less, nablarch-css-base, nablarch-css-color-default, nablarch-css-common, etc.) that describe the expected committed state.
findings.source_evidence:

              │     │     ├── ui_build.sh
              │     └── node_modules/

              │           ├── nablarch-css-base/ ...
              └── ui_test/ ...
